meaning: adj.发光的,辐射的,容光焕发的
examples: On her wedding day the bride looked truly radiant.
The earth would be a frozen ball if it were not for the radiant heat of the sun.
It's made of platinum and features a GIA certified radiant cut diamond weighing 10.04 carats.
The star athlete has turned to fat and the homecoming queen is substantially less radiant.
